title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 07 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 07 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 07 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower， futures market falling trends，the main contract closed 839.5，an increase of 0.72% throughout the day; Traders ship according to market conditions; The weekly procurement of steel mills has basically ended, with a cautious wait-and-see approach prevailing. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general. PBF at Shandong port dealt 830-836 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
